room.caption: [G3-5F] This castle must have seen better days hence all the unstable ground.

instance.creationCode:
x+=8;y+=8 sprite_index=sCV_Gems image_index=1 image_speed=0 soundToPlay=global.snd_HeartPiece stringToShow="You found the [Green Gem]." fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=1360 instance_destroy()
